name: Mike Birbiglia
bio: Mike Birbiglia is an American comedian, writer, director, and actor known for long-form autobiographical solo shows that blend stand-up and theater, with subjects ranging from his sleep disorder to marriage and mortality. His shows Sleepwalk With Me, My Girlfriends Boyfriend, Thank God for Jokes, The New One, and The Old Man and the Pool moved from off-Broadway and Broadway to Netflix specials. He also wrote, directed, and starred in the films Sleepwalk with Me and Dont Think Twice.

timeline.ev: Opens solo show Sleepwalk with Me off-Broadway
My Girlfriends Boyfriend wins the Lucille Lortel Award
Writes, directs, and stars in the film Sleepwalk with Me
Releases Netflix special Thank God for Jokes
Opens The Old Man and the Pool on Broadway
Releases Netflix special The Good Life

accolades: Lucille Lortel Award for Outstanding Solo Show (My Girlfriends Boyfriend)
Sundance NEXT Audience Award (Sleepwalk with Me, 2012)
SAG Award for ensemble in Orange Is the New Black (2016)

specials.t: The Old Man and the Pool

bits.t: Mike Birbiglia Gets Rubbed the Wrong Way
Mike Birbiglia Admits Why He Didn't Want Kids

films.note: Wrote and directed an improv-troupe drama.
